name.title: Name
name.description: Display name for the thermostat in HomeKit.

serialNumber.title: Serial Number
serialNumber.description: Nefit Easy serial number — found in the Nefit Easy app under Settings > About.

accessKey.title: Access Key
accessKey.description: Nefit Easy access key — found in the Nefit Easy app under Settings > About.

password.title: Password
password.description: Password set during initial Nefit Easy app setup.

pollingInterval.title: Polling Interval (seconds)
pollingInterval.description: How often to poll the thermostat for updates. Default: 60 seconds.

debug.title: Enable Debug Logging
debug.description: Log detailed diagnostic information. Disable in normal use.

hotWater.title: Hot Water Switch
hotWater.description: Adds a Switch tile to turn domestic hot water on or off directly from HomeKit.

manualMode.title: Manual / Schedule Mode Switch
manualMode.description: Adds a Switch tile to toggle between manual temperature control (on) and the thermostat's built-in weekly schedule (off).

holidayMode.title: Holiday Mode Indicator
holidayMode.description: Adds a read-only Switch tile that shows whether Holiday Mode is active on the thermostat. Cannot be toggled from HomeKit — set it on the thermostat or app directly.

awayMode.title: Home / Away Occupancy Sensor
awayMode.description: Adds an Occupancy Sensor that shows whether the thermostat considers the home occupied or away. Useful for HomeKit automations.

outdoorTemperature.title: Outdoor Temperature Sensor
outdoorTemperature.description: Adds a read-only Temperature Sensor showing the outdoor temperature. Requires an outdoor sensor connected to the thermostat.

hotWaterTemperature.title: Hot Water Temperature Sensor
hotWaterTemperature.description: Adds a read-only Temperature Sensor showing the current hot water tank temperature.

layout.title: Optional Features
layout.description: Each feature adds a separate tile in the Home app. Enable only what you need.
